mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_LINE (APPROVAL_ID, STEP_NO, APPROVER_ID) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{stepNo}, #{approverId})
mapper.select: SELECT al.*, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS approverName, p.POSITION_NAME AS approverPositionName FROM APPROVAL_LINE al JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON al.APPROVER_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE al.APPROVAL_ID = #{approvalId} ORDER BY al.STEP_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE APPROVAL_LINE SET LINE_STATUS = #{lineStatus}, LINE_COMMENT = #{lineComment}, DECIDED_AT = NOW() WHERE LINE_ID = #{lineId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = #{approvalId} AND LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT'
